---
title: "Timetable"
toc: false
---

::: {.content-section}

::: {.schedule-day}

### Day 1: Monday, 6 July 2026

*Solid-Liquid Interfaces*

| Time | Session | Speaker(s) |
|------|---------|---------|
| 08:00 – 08:45 | Registration & Welcome Coffee | |
| 08:45 – 09:00 | **Opening & Introduction to Summer School** | [Rohit Pillai](https://eng.ed.ac.uk/about/people/dr-rohit-pillai) |
| 09:00 – 10:00 | **Fundamentals of NEMD for Fluids and Interfaces** | [Peter Daivis](https://www.rmit.edu.au/profiles/d/peter-daivis) |
| 10:00 – 10:30 | *Coffee Break* | |
| 10:30 – 11:30 | **Interfacial Properties of Solid-Liquid Systems** | [Nicodemo Di Pasquale](https://www.unibo.it/sitoweb/nicodemo.dipasquale/en) |
| 11:30 – 12:30 | **Slip Lengths & Flows Past Surfaces** | [Samy Merabia](https://smerabia8.wixsite.com/monsite) |
| 12:30 – 13:30 | **Heat Flux and Interfacial Thermal Transport Across the Wall** | [Donatas Surblys](https://www.ifs.tohoku.ac.jp/mht/jp/members/donatas.html) |
| 13:30 – 14:30 | *Lunch* | |
| 14:30 – 16:30 | **Hands-on session: Solid-Liquid Interfaces** | [EPCC](https://www.epcc.ed.ac.uk/) |
| 16:30 – 17:00 | *Coffee Break* | |
| 17:00 – 17:30 | **The Landscape of MD Applications: Nanobubbles for Energy and Fuels** | [Xinyan Wang](https://www.brunel.ac.uk/people/xinyan-wang) |

:::

::: {.schedule-day}

### Day 2: Tuesday, 7 July 2026

*Liquid-Vapour Interfaces*

| Time | Session | Speaker(s) |
|------|---------|---------|
| 08:30 – 09:00 | Coffee | |
| 09:00 – 10:00 | **The Liquid-Vapour Interface: Surface Tension and Structure** | [Duncan Dockar](https://multiscaleflowx.github.io/team/dockar-duncan/) |
| 10:00 – 11:00 | **Microscopic Structure of Liquid Interfaces: Capillary Waves and Intrinsic Profiles** | [Marcello Sega](https://profiles.ucl.ac.uk/89616-marcello-sega) |
| 11:00 – 11:30 | *Coffee Break* | |
| 11:30 – 12:30 | **Nanoscale Hydrodynamics** | [Jesper Hansen](https://forskning.ruc.dk/en/persons/jschmidt/) |
| 12:30 – 13:30 | *Lunch* | |
| 13:30 – 15:30 | **Hands-on session: Liquid-Vapour Interfaces** | [EPCC](https://www.epcc.ed.ac.uk/) |
| 15:30 – 16:00 | *Coffee Break* | |
| 16:00 – 16:45 | **Machine Learning Potentials: Fundamentals** | [Ioan-Bogdan Magdau](https://www.ncl.ac.uk/nes/people/profile/ioanmagdau.html) |
| 16:45 – 17:30 | **Machine Learning Potentials for Fluids & Interfaces** | [Edward Smith](https://www.brunel.ac.uk/people/edward-smith) |

:::

---

**Note:** Schedule is preliminary and subject to change. Each day follows a morning theory, afternoon practice format: concepts introduced in morning lectures are applied during hands-on sessions on ARCHER2, the UK's national supercomputer, with support from EPCC training staff.

### Venue

All sessions will be held at **[Rowan Studio](https://information-services.ed.ac.uk/computing/audio-visual-multi-media/teaching-spaces/interactive-360-degree-images-of-teaching-spaces/nucleus/nucleus-206-rowan), King's Buildings Campus, The University of Edinburgh**. Detailed venue information and directions will be provided to registered participants.

:::
